videos.title: What the Fed Is Doing to Your Money (And Why You Didn’t Notice) - Andy Tanner
info: How the Federal Reserve affects inflation is one of the most important concepts investors need to understand, and in this episode of the Rich Dad StockCast, host Del Denney sits down with Rich Dad expert Andy Tanner to break it down.
advice: Most people don’t realize that monetary policy directly impacts everything from the price of groceries to the value of their investments. Andy explains how the Federal Reserve controls money supply and interest rates—and why those decisions consistently favor asset owners over savers.
warning: Ek araştırma önerilir.
videos.key_idea: What the Fed Is Doing to Your Money (And Why You Didn’t Notice) - Andy Tanner
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

videos.title: The One Number That Actually Leads to Financial Freedom - Robert Kiyosaki
info: The Wealth number is the most important metric for financial freedom, and in this episode of The Rich Dad Radio Show, Robert Kiyosaki breaks down why most people are calculating it completely wrong.
advice: For decades, people have been taught to rely on pensions, 401(k)s, and Social Security as the foundation of retirement. Robert explains why these systems no longer work—and in many cases, were never designed to work for you. He walks through how inflation erodes savings, how fees quietly drain retirement accounts, and why relying on government-backed systems puts your financial future at risk .
warning: You’ll learn the difference between building a “pile of money” versus building monthly cash flow, why passive income—not net worth—is the real measure of wealth, and how the rich structure their income
videos.key_idea: The One Number That Actually Leads to Financial Freedom - Robert Kiyosaki
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

videos.title: Why Saving Money Doesn’t Work Anymore - Robert Kiyosaki
info: Why savers are losers is one of the most misunderstood truths in modern finance—and it’s costing people their future.
advice: Robert explains that the rules of money changed in 1971 when the U.S. left the gold standard. Since then, the dollar has steadily lost purchasing power as more money is created—quietly reducing the value of savings over time.
warning: He also highlights why May 15th matters—not as a one-time event, but as a reminder of how central bank decisions influence interest rates, inflation, and the value of your money. Most people ignore these shifts, but they directly impact your financial future.
videos.key_idea: Why Saving Money Doesn’t Work Anymore - Robert Kiyosaki
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.

videos.title: Why Asia Is Booming While America Struggles - Robert Kiyosaki, Richard Duncan
info: Visit www.richardduncaneconomics.com Use Code CRASH to receive 50% off Your Subsription
advice: Why the US dollar is losing value is one of the most important questions investors must understand today. In this episode of the Rich Dad Radio Show, Robert Kiyosaki sits down with economist Richard Duncan to explain how the global financial system evolved—and why it is becoming increasingly unstable.
warning: Richard explains that the turning point came in 1971, when the US dollar was taken off the gold standard. This shift allowed the United States to expand credit without limits, transforming the economy from one based on savings and production into one driven by debt and consumption.
videos.key_idea: Why Asia Is Booming While America Struggles - Robert Kiyosaki, Richard Duncan
videos.decision: The Rich Dad Channel (Kiyosaki) takipçileri ve konuyla ilgilenenler için.
